name: What is the best way to use AI in an SEO workflow?
description: Use AI for research and drafting, then have humans handle strategy, fact-checking, and approval. That combination is usually stronger than full automation.

mainEntity.name: What is the best way to use AI in an SEO workflow?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use AI to speed up research and drafting, not to replace expert judgment. The strongest setups pair AI efficiency with human strategy, fact-checking, and final editorial approval.
acceptedAnswer.description: Use AI for research and drafting, then have humans handle strategy, fact-checking, and approval. That combination is usually stronger than full automation.
